title: Magical Portuguese Roast Chicken
description: A flavorful roast chicken dish infused with magical spices, inspired by traditional Portuguese cuisine. Perfect for a special occasion or a cozy dinner.

ingredients.name: Portuguese Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: available at your local magical market

instructions: Rinse the chicken and pat dry with paper towels.
Mix the Portuguese Spice Blend with olive oil, salt, pepper, and garlic. Rub the mixture all over the chicken.
Stuff the chicken cavity with the sprig of oregano, a few slices of lemon, and a tablespoon of rhubarb jam.
Place the chicken in a roasting pan and put it in the oven.
Roast the chicken for 45-50 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
Baste the chicken with pan juices every 20 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before carving.
Serve the chicken with additional rhubarb jam on the side, if desired.
